work_statement_unknown.head: Couldn't confirm from the extracted text
work_statement_unknown.reason: Zero CLINs, zero clauses, zero delivery items, zero submission requirements, and no evaluation factors were extracted from the document. The governing work statement (SOW/PWS/SOO) was not present in the parsed text — almost certainly contained in an un-parsed attachment or the extraction pipeline failed entirely.
work_statement_unknown.action: Upload the attachment to resolve this. It's the single highest-leverage line in the audit — it decides whether you propose a method (SOW) or propose to outcomes (PWS/SOO).

l02_catches.title: SAM.gov registration and annual reps & certs may lapse before award
l02_catches.why_invisible: No clause was extracted flagging FAR 52.204-7 or 52.204-13, so the compliance checker shows no flag — but if SAM.gov registration expires between proposal submission and award, the offer becomes ineligible and the award can be rescinded.
l02_catches.move: Verify SAM.gov registration expiration date today and renew if it will expire within 12 months. Confirm all representations and certifications (including SPRS score for DFARS 252.204-7019) are current.

l02_catches.title: SPRS cybersecurity score may not be posted, blocking award even if technically selected
l02_catches.why_invisible: Without DFARS 252.204-7019/7020 being extracted, the checker shows no cybersecurity flag — but DoD contracting officers are required to verify SPRS scores before award; a missing or zero score will stop award regardless of technical merit.
l02_catches.move: Log into SPRS (https://www.sprs.csd.disa.mil) and confirm a current self-assessment score is posted. If not, complete the NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment and post the score before the offer due date.

l02_catches.title: Subcontractor flow-down clauses cannot be identified, creating teaming agreement gaps
l02_catches.why_invisible: Zero clauses were extracted, so no flow-down analysis was performed — but if the solicitation contains DFARS 252.204-7012 (CUI/cyber), 252.227-7013 (technical data), or ITAR-related clauses, subcontractors must be bound to the same obligations or the prime is in breach.
l02_catches.move: Once clauses are extracted, immediately identify all mandatory flow-downs per DFARS PGI 204.7403 and FAR 52.244-6. Revise all teaming agreements and NDAs to incorporate required flow-downs before proposal submission.

l02_catches.title: If classified work is involved, facility clearance and personnel clearance lead times may exceed period of performance start
l02_catches.why_invisible: No security clauses were extracted, so no clearance flag was raised — but DoD contracts involving classified information require verified facility clearances (FCL) that can take 6-18 months to obtain, and starting work without them is a contract violation.
l02_catches.move: Contact the contracting officer to determine if a DD Form 254 (Contract Security Classification Specification) is attached. If classified work is required, verify current FCL status with your Facility Security Officer (FSO) immediately.

confidence_notes.uncertain: The governing work statement type could not be determined because no work statement text was extracted from the document.
confidence_notes.assumption: Classified as 'unknown' — no bid strategy assumptions were made about whether the work is prescriptive or outcomes-based.
confidence_notes.resolve: Retrieve and parse Section C (Description/Specifications/Work Statement) of the solicitation to identify the document type.

confidence_notes.uncertain: The NAICS code was not present in the extracted data, so size standard and set-aside eligibility cannot be confirmed.
confidence_notes.assumption: No size standard assumption was made; all size-related compliance checks are deferred.
confidence_notes.resolve: Verify NAICS code against SF-1449 Block 10 or the SAM.gov synopsis for this solicitation number.

confidence_notes.uncertain: No offer due date or time was extracted, making it impossible to confirm the proposal deadline or establish a submission schedule.
confidence_notes.assumption: No deadline assumption was made; all scheduling is on hold.
confidence_notes.resolve: Check SF-1449 Block 8 or the SAM.gov notice for the exact date, time, and timezone of the offer due date.

confidence_notes.uncertain: The contract type (FFP, CPFF, T&M, IDIQ, etc.) was not extracted, so cost risk, accounting system requirements, and fee structure cannot be assessed.
confidence_notes.assumption: No contract type assumption was made; all cost-risk and accounting system checks are deferred.
confidence_notes.resolve: Identify contract type from Section B of the solicitation or the SF-1449 contract type block.

confidence_notes.uncertain: Zero CLINs were extracted, so it is unknown whether this is a single-CLIN, multi-CLIN, or IDIQ task order structure.
confidence_notes.assumption: No pricing structure assumption was made; the CLIN list is treated as entirely unknown.
confidence_notes.resolve: Obtain Section B of the solicitation and extract all CLINs, SLINs, ELINs, and associated quantities and units of issue.

confidence_notes.uncertain: Zero FAR/DFARS clauses were extracted, so no trap clause analysis could be performed and all compliance obligations are unknown.
confidence_notes.assumption: No clause compliance assumptions were made; the contract is treated as having unknown obligations.
confidence_notes.resolve: Extract Section I and Section H from the full solicitation document and re-run the DFARS trap analysis.

confidence_notes.uncertain: The set-aside designation was not extracted, so eligibility to compete cannot be confirmed for any business category.
confidence_notes.assumption: No set-aside assumption was made; the solicitation is treated as open competition pending confirmation.
confidence_notes.resolve: Check SAM.gov notice or SF-1449 Block 10 for set-aside designation and verify applicable SBA certifications.
